title: RCF Shared Definitions
description: Shared $defs referenced via $ref from every other RCF schema. ID patterns, status enums, version string, timestamp format, and the docRef shape. This file is not a document schema; consumers register it alongside the 10 doc-type schemas at validator init.

prdId.description: PRD identifier. Three-digit minimum, unbounded above.

acId.description: Acceptance Criterion identifier. Supports hierarchical form (AC-101-1) and flat form (AC-201). Authors pick per project.

tcId.description: Test Case identifier. TS suffix (three digits) joined to a lowercase alphanumeric slug.

version.description: Semantic version string for individual RCF documents.

authoringStatus.description: Authoring lifecycle status for PRD, REQ, US, TAD, TAC, BS.

adrStatus.description: Nygard / MADR convention status for ADRs. Draft state prepended in 0.2.0.

executionStatus.description: Execution-state status for FBS documents and FBS slots within a Build Sequence.

id.description: Document id (matches the doc-type-specific id pattern).

path.description: Relative path to the document file.

docRef.description: Reference to a root document by id and file path. Used by the manifest.
